content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type and context: This is a pull request review request for a gene annotation review. The PR adds 9 new files for reviewing S. coelicolor fusB gene annotations, including the main review YAML file, supporting literature, and metadata.

b. Request type: This is a code review request. The user wants feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information:
- PR adds review for STRCO fusB (Elongation factor G 2)
- 6 GO annotations reviewed with specific actions (ACCEPT, MARK_AS_OVER_ANNOTATED, UNDECIDED)
- Includes supporting literature (3 PMIDs) and PANTHER data
- Author claims validation passes

d. Main tasks:
- Review the gene annotation YAML file for quality and adherence to schema
- Check supporting files for completeness and accuracy
- Validate the annotation decisions against evidence
- Check for any potential issues or improvements
- Verify test coverage and validation

e. Plan of action:
1. Read the main review file and supporting documents
2. Check schema compliance and best practices
3. Review annotation decisions for scientific accuracy
4. Check file organization and completeness
5. Run validation commands if possible
6. Provide comprehensive feedback

f. Limitations: I may not be able to run certain validation commands due to dependencies or permissions, but I can analyze the files directly and provide feedback on structure and content.
</analysis>

input.body: ### Review Progress I'll review this pull request focusing on code quality, best practices, potential issues, performance, security, and test coverage for the STRCO fusB gene annotation review. #### Todo List - [ ] Read and analyze the main gene review YAML file - [ ] Review supporting files (UniProt, GOA, notes, publications) - [ ] Check schema compliance and data structure - [ ] Validate annotation decisions against scientific evidence - [ ] Check file organization and naming conventions - [ ] Run validation commands if possible - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback and recommendations --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24868323761)
